series_metadata.series_description: Requests to the Controlling Board for approval of emergency expenditures for Capital Improvements, Projects, purchase made without competitive selection (Bid Waiver), transfer of Capital Improvement Funds and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years and then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years and then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
